title.rendered: Farewell The FX Company, Welcome to Travel FX

content.rendered:
From today, all our currency buy-backs will be provided by The FX Company’s sister company Travel FX Ltd.

The FX Company was created to offer a buy-back service for individuals that wanted to sell their foreign currency at the best rates. We quickly grew into one of the leading providers of online currency buy-backs, due to our no-nonsense service and commitment to always offer the best rates online.

By combining our service with Travel FX Ltd we continue to offer the same buy-back service while updating our process focusing on great rates, speedy service, communication and convenience.

Ordering will be just as simple as before, but you will now also have access to a client area where you can track and see the status of your order.

We are proud to have provided buy-back services to the many thousands of clients who have ordered through The FX Company.

We thank you for being part of this journey with us and are excited to continue providing this service to many thousands more.

Find out more about Travel FX here.

About Travel FX

 

Do you have any leftover currency? visit our currency buy-back page and see how much you’ll get back.

itemListElement.name: Farewell The FX Company, Welcome to Travel FX

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
